composite_description: Sharp drawdown in bear market -- near-term noisy, 60d edge solid. Size smaller. All three assets confirm the drawdown.
brief:
SIGNAL: BUY | BEAR × DEEP DRAWDOWN

All three major assets have fallen into deep drawdown territory (BTC z-score -3.61, ETH -2.77, SOL -2.93) within an established bear market regime. This configuration—sharp drawdowns during downtrends—historically shows noisy near-term behavior but a solid 60-day edge. Backtest median returns: +0.5% at 7d, -1.1% at 14d, -0.5% at 30d, +5.0% at 60d across 84 comparable bear-phase days. Positioning size accordingly reflects the elevated uncertainty in the 14–30d window.

BTC dominance sits at 56%, with stablecoins at 11.9% of total mcap. Funding rates are slightly inverted (-5.9% annualized), adding minor bearish texture but not altering the drawdown signal. Fear & Greed at 12 reflects capitulation sentiment consistent with the depth of the move. The 60-day horizon offers the most reliable edge in this configuration.
